_comment: JioPC Session Hibernate — per-app restore master list. Ordered: first match wins, generic fallback for anything unmatched. Copy to $XDG_CONFIG_HOME/jiopc-hibernate/handlers.json to override. A rule whose 'handler' is not one of the built-in code handlers (chrome/terminal/filemanager/document) is applied DECLARATIVELY: generic capture plus the static restore_args below — i.e. a new app can be added with config alone, no code change.

handlers.comment: Google Chrome / Chromium. Clean-shutdown on save; --restore-last-session on relaunch reopens all tabs.
qterminal is the LxQt default (flag --workdir). lxterminal/xterm use --working-directory; adjust per emulator.
PCManFM-Qt, the LxQt file manager. Takes the folder path as a positional argument.
LibreOffice Writer/Calc/Impress and friends. Reopens document path(s) passed as arguments.
EXAMPLE of a declarative (code-free) handler: featherpad/gedit/kate reopen a file passed as an argument. Generic capture finds the file in argv; no Python class required.
